# 📄 ZK Swordsman Blade Forge v3.0 (narrative)
**document** · swordsman · knowledge

Narrative companion for the blade forge. UOR module, forge ceremonies, blade dimensions, hexagram encoding. Pairs with the operational SPECIFICATION.md v1.0.1 (see doc-zk-blade-forge-spec).
